revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Xtd]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 278 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Xtd]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]][[Category:qq]] <!--redirecting existing page-->

#[[en:Template:Xtd]] [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Pages with blank templates]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> <!--ing existing page-->

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Category:Pages with blank templates" to "Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}"
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Xtd]] [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Xtd]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude> [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Xtd]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Xtd]]<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]] <noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace Template]]</noinclude>[[Category:11]] </noinclude> <!--ing existing page-->

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:0}}|{{FormattingError|[[:{{safesubst:#invoke:TEMPLATENAME|main}}]] is only for examples of style and formatting. Do not use it in actual articles.}}|{{{1|Example text}}}}} {{Documentation|Template:Xt/doc}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:0}}|{{FormattingError|[[:{{safesubst:#invoke:TEMPLATENAME|main}}]] is only for examples of style and formatting. Do not use it in actual articles.}}|{{{1|Example text}}}}} {{Documentation|Template:Xt/doc}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
